code:
import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut i = 0
mut idx = 0
mut current = ""
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(text, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 10
      println("[#{idx}] #{current}")
      idx = idx + 1
      current = ""
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(current)
  println("[#{idx}] #{current}")
end
